summary: Lead applied a minimal CI fix after PR #227 Quality/Web/Browser Smoke failed in full vitest: tests/content-schema-graph-source.test.ts still built an M2 prototype fixture DTO without the now-required explicit topology and district topologyMetadata fields. The fix updates that test fixture only, preserving the accepted topology implementation and content-lock boundaries.

tests_run.result: PR #227 failed Quality/Web/Browser Smoke in tests/content-schema-graph-source.test.ts because the test DTO lacked topology and districts[0].topologyMetadata.
Focused schema test passed: 1 test file, 18 tests.
CI-equivalent test command passed locally: architecture check, determinism, 44 root test files / 362 tests, and web tests 1 file / 10 tests.
format:check, lint, typecheck, and architecture:check passed; architecture self-test produced 15 expected violations.

decisions.decision: Only tests/content-schema-graph-source.test.ts changed. The fix updates a test DTO to the explicit topology schema contract; it does not alter production content, compiler/runtime authority, client rendering, content lock, or roadmap scope.
Historical, systems, QA R2, and lead acceptance remain valid. This CI fix is mechanical coverage alignment for the new required schema fields.

risks.summary: Client rendering/hit testing remains downstream and is not approved by this CI fix.
M7 content lock remains blocked pending full topology recovery validation and product-owner reconsideration.

requested_action: Push CI fix, wait for PR CI, merge to main if checks pass, then close M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001 after origin/main integration.
